description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front, featuring a colorful diagonal-striped wallpaper and a digital clock reading 9:41 AM. The front screen also displays a passcode entry prompt and a power icon in the upper right corner. The back of the phone is matte black with a prominent, multicolored logo centered below a dual-lens camera module positioned vertically in the top left corner. The phone is slim, with rounded corners and a slightly raised camera bump. The sides are smooth and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with minimal visible buttons. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a colorful display, matte black back, and dual rear cameras. Features a multicolored logo and minimal side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, colorful touchscreen with a digital clock, passcode prompt, and power icon.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the phone's slim profile and absence of visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a matte black surface, dual vertical cameras in the top left, and a multicolored logo centered.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the thinness of the device and a possible subtle button outline.
attribute_brand_logo: A multicolored, oval-shaped logo is centered on the back of the phone, just below the camera module. The logo features a combination of red, yellow, green, and blue colors.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful diagonal-striped wallpaper, a large digital clock reading 9:41 AM, a passcode entry prompt, and a power icon in the upper right corner. There are also five circles indicating passcode entry slots.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses arranged vertically in the top left corner on the back of the phone, accompanied by a small flash module.
attribute_button_layout: A single power button is visible on the right edge, with a possible volume button outline. No buttons are visible on the front or left edge.
